        const $chip = $j(`<div class="sw-custom-chip" data-idx="${idx}" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:3px 8px;background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);${clickable}">
          <span>${esc(opt.label)}</span>
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);opacity:.7;">· ${groupLabel}</span>
          ${_customEditMode ? '<button class="sw-custom-del" style="background:transparent;border:none;color:#c41;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:0 2px;line-height:1;" title="删除">✕</button>' : ''}
        </div>`);
        $chip.find('.sw-custom-del').on('click', (e) => {
          e.stopPropagation();
          customOptions[_customPoolActive].splice(idx, 1);
          saveCustomOptions();
          _renderCustomList();
          _refreshPoolFor(_customPoolActive);
          toast('success','已删除');
        });
        $list.append($chip);
      });
    };

    // 打开"单条添加"弹窗
    const _openSingleAddModal = () => {
      const poolKey = _customPoolActive;
      const poolName = poolKey === 'era' ? '时代背景' : poolKey === 'inspiration' ? '灵感池' : '风格';
      const hasGroups = (poolKey !== 'style');
      showModal({
        title: `单条添加 · ${poolName}`,
        body: `
          <div class="dg-field">
            <label>选项名称</label>
            <input type="text" id="sw-cust-dlg-label" placeholder="填写选项名称..." autofocus>
          </div>
          ${hasGroups ? `
          <div class="dg-field">
            <label>所属分类（不选则归入"自定义"组）</label>
            <select id="sw-cust-dlg-group">${_buildGroupSelectHTML(poolKey, '')}</select>
          </div>` : '<div class="dg-hint">风格池无分类，直接添加到风格列表。</div>'}
        `,
        footer: `
          <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-cust-dlg-ok" style="flex:1;">添加</button>
          <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-cust-dlg-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">取消</button>
        `,
        onAfterRender: () => {
          const $m = getPopup();
          $m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-label').on('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') $m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-ok').click(); });
          $m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-ok').on('click', () => {
            const label = ($m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-label').val() || '').trim();
            if (!label) { toast('warning','请先填写名称'); return; }
            if (_isTaken(poolKey, label)) { toast('warning','该选项已存在'); return; }
            const group = hasGroups ? ($m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-group').val() || '') : '';
            customOptions[poolKey].push({ label, group });
            saveCustomOptions();
            closeModal();
            _renderCustomList();
            _refreshPoolFor(poolKey);
            toast('success', `已添加「${label}」`);
          });
          $m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
        },
      });
    };

    // 打开"批量添加"弹窗
    const _openBulkAddModal = () => {
      const poolKey = _customPoolActive;
      const poolName = poolKey === 'era' ? '时代背景' : poolKey === 'inspiration' ? '灵感池' : '风格';
      const hasGroups = (poolKey !== 'style');
      showModal({
        title: `批量添加 · ${poolName}`,
        body: `
          <div class="dg-field">
            <label>粘贴内容（每行一个选项）</label>
            <textarea id="sw-cust-dlg-bulk" rows="8" placeholder="一行一条，回车分隔..."></textarea>
          </div>
          ${hasGroups ? `
          <div class="dg-field">
            <label>全部归入哪个分类？（不选归入"自定义"组）</label>
            <select id="sw-cust-dlg-group">${_buildGroupSelectHTML(poolKey, '')}</select>
          </div>` : '<div class="dg-hint">风格池无分类。</div>'}
        `,
        footer: `
          <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-cust-dlg-ok" style="flex:1;">批量添加</button>
          <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-cust-dlg-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">取消</button>
        `,
        onAfterRender: () => {
          const $m = getPopup();
          $m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-ok').on('click', () => {
            const raw = ($m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-bulk').val() || '').trim();
            if (!raw) { toast('warning','请先粘贴内容'); return; }
            const lines = raw.split(/[\r\n]+/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
            if (!lines.length) { toast('warning','没有有效行'); return; }
            const group = hasGroups ? ($m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-group').val() || '') : '';
            let added = 0, skipped = 0;
            lines.forEach(label => {
              if (_isTaken(poolKey, label)) { skipped++; return; }
              customOptions[poolKey].push({ label, group });
              added++;
            });
            saveCustomOptions();
            closeModal();
            _renderCustomList();
            _refreshPoolFor(poolKey);
            const msg = skipped ? `新增 ${added} 项，跳过已存在 ${skipped} 项` : `已添加 ${added} 项`;
            toast('success', msg);
          });
          $m.find('#sw-cust-dlg-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
        },
      });
    };

    // 池子 tab 切换
    $p.find('.sw-custom-tab').on('click', function() {
      $p.find('.sw-custom-tab').removeClass('active');
      $j(this).addClass('active');
      _customPoolActive = $j(this).data('pool');
      _renderCustomList();
    });

    // 编辑模式切换
    $p.find('#sw-custom-edit-toggle').on('click', function() {
      _customEditMode = !_customEditMode;
      $j(this).text(_customEditMode ? '完成' : '编辑').toggleClass('active', _customEditMode);
      _renderCustomList();
    });

    // 单条添加按钮 → 弹窗
    $p.find('#sw-custom-single-btn').on('click', _openSingleAddModal);

    // 批量添加按钮 → 弹窗
    $p.find('#sw-custom-bulk-btn').on('click', _openBulkAddModal);

    // 初始化
    _renderCustomList();
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Pool 面板渲染
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function renderPoolPanel(poolData, containerSel, className, idPrefix) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $c = $p.find(containerSel); if (!$c.length) return;
    $c.empty();
    poolData.forEach((group, gi) => {
      const groupId = `${idPrefix}g-${gi}`;
      const $g = $j(`<div class="sw-pool-group" id="${groupId}">
          <div class="sw-pool-group-header">
            <div>
              <span class="sw-pool-group-chev">▸</span>
              <span class="sw-pool-group-name">${esc(group.group)}</span>
              <span class="sw-pool-group-meta">(${group.items.length})</span>
              <button class="sw-pool-group-selectall" data-group-idx="${gi}">全选</button>
            </div>
            <span class="sw-pool-group-meta sw-pool-group-count" style="font-size:10px;">0 / ${group.items.length}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="sw-pool-group-body ${className}"></div>
        </div>`);
      const $body = $g.find('.sw-pool-group-body');
      group.items.forEach(item => {
        const $t = $j(`<button class="dg-tag-btn" data-pool-item="${esc(item)}" style="padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;">${esc(item)}</button>`);
        $t.on('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          $j(this).toggleClass('active');
          updatePoolGroupCount($g);
          updateAllPoolSelCounts();
        });
        $body.append($t);
      });
      // Header toggles expand
      $g.find('.sw-pool-group-header').on('click', function(e) {
        if ($j(e.target).hasClass('sw-pool-group-selectall')) return;
        $g.toggleClass('expanded');
      });
      // Select-all toggles all items in this group
      $g.find('.sw-pool-group-selectall').on('click', function(e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        const $btn = $j(this), allActive = $body.find('.dg-tag-btn:not(.active)').length === 0;
        $body.find('.dg-tag-btn').toggleClass('active', !allActive);
        $btn.toggleClass('active', !allActive);
        updatePoolGroupCount($g);
        updateAllPoolSelCounts();
      });
      $c.append($g);
    });
  }

  function updatePoolGroupCount($g) {
    const total = $g.find('.dg-tag-btn').length;
    const sel = $g.find('.dg-tag-btn.active').length;
    $g.find('.sw-pool-group-count').text(`${sel} / ${total}`);
    $g.find('.sw-pool-group-selectall').toggleClass('active', sel === total && total > 0);
  }

  // 统计整个池子已选项数，更新标签右侧的 "已选 N 项" 徽章
  function updatePoolSelCount(panelSel, badgeSel) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $panel = $p.find(panelSel);
    const $badge = $p.find(badgeSel);
    if (!$panel.length || !$badge.length) return;
    const n = $panel.find('.dg-tag-btn.active').length;
    if (n > 0) $badge.show().text(`已选 ${n} 项`);
    else $badge.hide().text('');
  }
  function updateAllPoolSelCounts() {
    updatePoolSelCount('#sw-era-pool-panel',  '#sw-era-selcount');
    updatePoolSelCount('#sw-insp-pool-panel', '#sw-insp-selcount');
    updatePoolSelCount('#sw-style-pool-panel','#sw-style-selcount');
  }

  const CHOICE_HINTS = {
    scale: {
      '日常向': '决定冲突上限：低压日常、关系补全、隐藏切片，不强塞危机。',
      '有冲突': '决定冲突上限：允许误会、竞争、短期危机，结局仍偏可控。',
      '重大危机': '决定冲突上限：核心矛盾升级，事件池需要强转折与高代价。',
      '生死存亡': '决定冲突上限：最高压情境，围绕生死、失控或不可逆选择展开。',
    },
    plotFocus: {
      '背景驱动': '决定趣味点来源：世界观规则是核心，世界背景和背景事件加权。',
      '灵感驱动': '决定趣味点来源：灵感机制是核心，情境场和灵感事件加权。',
      '关系驱动': '决定趣味点来源：角色互动是核心，互动信息和情绪爆点加权。',
      '均衡': '决定趣味点来源：背景、灵感、关系均衡展开，事件池平均分配。',
    },
    plotDirection: {
      '解谜探索': '决定叙事引擎：追答案与真相，核心事件走线索链。',
      '权谋争夺': '决定叙事引擎：追资源、位置或胜利，核心事件走博弈链。',
      '情感联结': '决定叙事引擎：追关系质变，核心事件走关系推进链。',
      '成长蜕变': '决定叙事引擎：追自我改变，核心事件走试炼与突破链。',
    },
    creativity: {
      '低': '决定设定大胆度：保守严谨，反转合理可推导，不打破主线基底。',
      '中': '决定设定大胆度：标准戏剧化，允许奇幻、巧合与双层反转。',
      '高': '决定设定大胆度：天马行空，允许规则突破、多灵感组合与元叙事。',
    },
  };

  function setChoiceHint(hintSel, hints, val) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const text = (val && val !== '随机') ? (hints[val] || '') : '';
    $p.find(hintSel).toggle(!!text).text(text);
  }

  function updateAllChoiceHints() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const activeVal = (gid) => $p.find('#' + gid + ' .dg-opt-btn.active').data('val') || '';
    setChoiceHint('#sw-scale-hint', CHOICE_HINTS.scale, activeVal('sw-scale-group'));
    setChoiceHint('#sw-plotfocus-hint', CHOICE_HINTS.plotFocus, activeVal('sw-plotfocus-group'));
    setChoiceHint('#sw-plotdirection-hint', CHOICE_HINTS.plotDirection, activeVal('sw-plotdirection-group'));
    setChoiceHint('#sw-creativity-hint', CHOICE_HINTS.creativity, activeVal('sw-creativity-group'));
  }

  // 风格池（扁平，单一 group）
  function renderStylePool() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $c = $p.find('#sw-style-pool-panel'); if (!$c.length) return;
    $c.empty();
    const $wrap = $j('<div class="sw-pool-group expanded"><div class="sw-pool-group-body sw-style-pool" style="display:flex;"></div></div>');
    const $body = $wrap.find('.sw-pool-group-body');
    STYLE_LIST.concat((customOptions.style||[]).map(c=>c&&c.label).filter(x=>x&&!STYLE_LIST.includes(x))).forEach(style => {
      const $t = $j(`<button class="dg-tag-btn" data-pool-item="${esc(style)}" style="padding:3px 8px;font-size:11px;">${esc(style)}</button>`);
      $t.on('click', function() { $j(this).toggleClass('active'); updateAllPoolSelCounts(); });
      $body.append($t);
    });
    $c.append($wrap);
    updatePoolSelCount('#sw-style-pool-panel','#sw-style-selcount');
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 主题切换
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function setTheme(t) {
    currentTheme = t;
    saveSettings();
    const $p = getPopup();
    if ($p) {
      $p.removeClass('sw-stardust sw-cherry sw-neon sw-fairytale').addClass(`sw-${t}`);
      // 更新标题图标 + 水印（昼夜），带缓存标志位强制浏览器刷新
      const iconUrl = iconFor(t);
      // 如果之前 onerror 把它 hide 了，切主题时要再显示出来
      $p.find('#sw-title-icon').css('display','').attr('src', '').attr('src', iconUrl);
      $p.find('#sw-watermark-fox').css('display','').attr('src', '').attr('src', iconUrl);
    }
    const names = { stardust:'星屑入夜', cherry:'樱信初启', neon:'霓虹觉醒', fairytale:'童话翻页' };
    toast('success', names[t] || `主题已切换至 ${t}`);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 人设库渲染
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function renderCharacterLibrary() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $list = $p.find('#sw-char-list'); if (!$list.length) return;
    $list.empty();
    if (!characters.length) {
      $list.html('<div class="dg-hint" id="sw-char-empty" style="grid-column:1/-1;">人设库为空，点击"添加角色"开始建档</div>');
      return;
    }
    characters.forEach((c, idx) => {
      const $item = $j(`<div class="sw-char-item">
        <div class="sw-char-item-info">
          <div class="sw-char-item-name">${esc(c.name)}</div>
          <div class="sw-char-item-role">${esc((c.description || '').slice(0, 40))}${(c.description || '').length > 40 ? '...' : ''}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sw-char-item-btns">
          <button class="dg-btn" data-edit="${idx}">编</button>
          <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-danger" data-del="${idx}">删</button>
        </div>
      </div>`);
      $item.find('[data-edit]').on('click', () => _openCharModal(idx));
      $item.find('[data-del]').on('click', () => {
        confirmDelete(c.name, () => {
          characters.splice(idx, 1);
          saveCharacters(); renderCharacterLibrary(); refreshCharacterSelects();
          toast('success','已删除');
        });
      });
      $list.append($item);
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 大总结
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function renderSummaryList() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $list = $p.find('#sw-summary-list');
    const $empty = $p.find('#sw-summary-empty');
    if (!$list.length) return;
    $list.empty();
    if (!summaries.length) { $empty.show(); return; }
    $empty.hide();
    summaries.forEach((s, idx) => {
      if (!s) return;
      const preview = (s.content || '').slice(0, 90).replace(/\s+/g,' ');
      const date = s.updatedAt || s.createdAt || '';
      const dateLabel = date ? new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN') : '';
      const $item = $j(`<div class="sw-summary-item" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--accent2);">
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
          <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--text);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.5px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${esc(s.title || '(未命名)')}</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${esc(preview)}${(s.content||'').length > 90 ? '…' : ''}</div>
          ${dateLabel ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);opacity:.7;margin-top:2px;">${dateLabel} · ${(s.content||'').length} 字</div>` : ''}
        </div>
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm sw-summary-edit">编辑</button>
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm dg-btn-danger sw-summary-del">✕</button>
      </div>`);
      $item.find('.sw-summary-edit').on('click', () => openSummaryEditModal(idx));
      $item.find('.sw-summary-del').on('click', () => {
        if (!confirm(`删除大总结「${s.title || '(未命名)'}」？`)) return;
        summaries.splice(idx, 1);
        saveSummaries();
        renderSummaryList();
        refreshSummarySelect();
        toast('success','已删除');
      });
      $list.append($item);
    });
  }

  // 打开添加 / 编辑 大总结弹窗（手动编辑）
  function openSummaryEditModal(idxOrNull, prefill) {
    const isNew = (idxOrNull == null || idxOrNull < 0);
    const s = isNew ? { title:'', content: (prefill && prefill.content) || '' } : summaries[idxOrNull];
    const title = isNew ? (prefill && prefill.title ? prefill.title : '') : (s.title || '');
    showModal({
      title: isNew ? '添加大总结' : `编辑大总结 · ${s.title || '(未命名)'}`,
      body: `
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>标题</label>
          <input type="text" id="sw-sum-title" placeholder="例如：主线第一季·初遇章..." value="${esc(title)}">
        </div>
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>总结内容</label>
          <textarea id="sw-sum-content" rows="14" placeholder="粘贴或编写大总结内容..." style="min-height:220px;">${esc(s.content || '')}</textarea>
          <div class="dg-hint" style="margin-top:4px;"><span id="sw-sum-charcount">0</span> 字</div>
        </div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-sum-save" style="flex:1;">${isNew ? '保存' : '更新'}</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-sum-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">取消</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $m = getPopup();
        const updateCount = () => $m.find('#sw-sum-charcount').text(($m.find('#sw-sum-content').val() || '').length);
        $m.find('#sw-sum-content').on('input', updateCount); updateCount();
        $m.find('#sw-sum-save').on('click', () => {
          const t = ($m.find('#sw-sum-title').val() || '').trim();
          const c = ($m.find('#sw-sum-content').val() || '').trim();
          if (!t) { toast('warning','请填写标题'); return; }
          if (!c) { toast('warning','请填写总结内容'); return; }
          const now = Date.now();
          if (isNew) {
            summaries.push({ id: `sum_${now}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7)}`, title: t, content: c, createdAt: now, updatedAt: now });
          } else {
            summaries[idxOrNull] = { ...summaries[idxOrNull], title: t, content: c, updatedAt: now };
          }
          saveSummaries();
          closeModal();
          renderSummaryList();
          refreshSummarySelect();
          toast('success', isNew ? '已添加大总结' : '已更新');
        });
        $m.find('#sw-sum-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  // 打开 AI 智能总结弹窗
  function openAiSummaryModal() {
    showModal({
      title: '✨ 智能总结',
      body: `
        <div class="dg-field" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
          <label>API 预设（可选）</label>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
            <select id="sw-ai-sum-preset-sel" style="flex:1;height:28px;font-size:12px;">
              <option value="">— 使用当前API配置 —</option>
            </select>
            <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-ai-sum-load-preset" type="button">载入</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>主线内容（上传 / 粘贴 / 从聊天记录标签获取）</label>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm dg-btn-primary" id="sw-ai-sum-upload-btn" type="button">📁 上传文件</button>
            <span id="sw-ai-sum-filename" class="dg-hint" style="flex:1;min-width:120px;font-size:11px;">支持 .txt / .yaml / .json / .md / .log （最大 10MB）</span>
            <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-ai-sum-clear" type="button">清空</button>
            <input type="file" id="sw-ai-sum-file" accept=".txt,.yaml,.yml,.json,.md,.log,text/*" style="display:none;">
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <span class="dg-hint" style="flex-shrink:0;margin-top:0;font-size:11px;">聊天标签</span>
            <input type="text" id="sw-ai-sum-tag" placeholder="留空=全部内容；填写则仅抓该标签" style="flex:1;min-width:100px;height:28px;padding:0 8px;font-size:12px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;background:var(--input-bg);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--input-text);box-sizing:border-box;">
            <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm dg-btn-primary" id="sw-ai-sum-fetch-btn" type="button">⚡ 从聊天记录获取</button>
          </div>
          <div id="sw-ai-sum-fetch-info" class="dg-hint" style="margin-bottom:4px;font-size:11px;"></div>
          <textarea id="sw-ai-sum-source" rows="8" placeholder="粘贴主线内容，或点上方「上传文件」/「从聊天记录获取」..." style="min-height:160px;"></textarea>
          <div class="dg-hint" style="margin-top:4px;"><span id="sw-ai-sum-src-count">0</span> 字</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>API 来源</label>
          <div id="sw-ai-sum-apiinfo" class="dg-info-card" style="padding:8px 10px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>填写要求（字数、粒度、格式等，自动保存到下次）</label>
          <textarea id="sw-ai-sum-reqs" rows="4" placeholder="例如：请按章节分段，每段 3-5 个要点，突出人物关系变化和关键伏笔。总字数控制在 2000 字左右..." style="min-height:90px;">${esc(aiSummaryDraft || '')}</textarea>
        </div>
        <div id="sw-ai-sum-preview-wrap" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;">
          <label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;">预览生成结果</label>
          <div id="sw-ai-sum-preview" class="dg-info-card" style="max-height:260px;overflow-y:auto;margin-top:4px;padding:10px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.65;white-space:pre-wrap;"></div>
        </div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-ai-sum-go" style="flex:1.2;">生成</button>
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-ai-sum-save" style="flex:1;display:none;">保存为大总结</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-ai-sum-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">关闭</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $m = getPopup();
        let generatedText = '';

        // 填充 API 预设列表
        const $psel = $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-preset-sel');
        savedPresets.forEach((pr, i) => $psel.append($j('<option>').val(i).text(pr.name)));
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-load-preset').on('click', () => {
          const idx = parseInt($psel.val());
          if (isNaN(idx) || !savedPresets[idx]) { toast('warning','请先选择预设'); return; }
          const pr = savedPresets[idx];
          if (pr.apiConfig) {
            apiConfig = { ...apiConfig, ...pr.apiConfig };
            renderApiInfo();
            toast('info', `已临时载入「${pr.name}」`);
          }
        });

        // API 状态
        function renderApiInfo() {
          const $i = $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-apiinfo');
          if (apiConfig.url && apiConfig.model) {
            $i.html(`使用当前配置：<b>${esc(apiConfig.model)}</b><br><span style="color:var(--text3);">${esc(apiConfig.url)}</span>`);
          } else {
            $i.html(`<span style="color:#c41;">未配置 API</span>，请先在【织梦配置 · API 配置】里填写，或从上方预设载入。`);
          }
        }
        renderApiInfo();

        // 字数统计
        const updateSrcCount = () => $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-src-count').text(($m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').val() || '').length);
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').on('input', updateSrcCount); updateSrcCount();

        // 从聊天记录指定标签里抓取内容
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-fetch-btn').on('click', () => {
          const rawTag = ($m.find('#sw-ai-sum-tag').val() || '').trim();
          const tag = rawTag.replace(/[<>\/\s]/g, '');
          try {
            const ctx = (typeof ST !== 'undefined' && ST && ST.getContext) ? ST.getContext() : null;
            if (!ctx || !Array.isArray(ctx.chat) || !ctx.chat.length) {
              $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-fetch-info').html('<span style="color:#c41;">未获取到聊天记录，请确认已进入对话</span>');
              toast('warning','未获取到聊天记录'); return;
            }
            if (!tag) {
              // 标签为空 → 抓取全部聊天内容（按"角色名：内容"整理）
              const lines = ctx.chat.map(m => {
                const who = (m.is_user ? (m.name || 'User') : (m.name || 'Char'));
                return `${who}：${m.mes || ''}`;
              }).filter(s => s.trim());
              const extracted = lines.join('\n\n');
              if (!extracted) { toast('warning','聊天记录为空'); return; }
              $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').val(extracted);
              $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-fetch-info').html(`✓ 已提取全部 <b>${lines.length}</b> 条消息，共 <b>${extracted.length}</b> 字`);
              updateSrcCount();
              toast('success', `已提取全部 ${lines.length} 条消息`);
              return;
            }
            // 否则按标签筛选
            const allText = ctx.chat.map(m => m.mes || '').join('\n');
            const regex = new RegExp(`<${tag}>[\\s\\S]*?<\\/${tag}>`, 'gi');
            const matches = allText.match(regex) || [];
            if (!matches.length) {
              $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-fetch-info').html(`<span style="color:#c41;">未找到 <${esc(tag)}>...</${esc(tag)}> 标签</span>`);
              toast('warning', `未找到 <${tag}> 标签`); return;
            }
            const extracted = matches
              .map(m => m.replace(new RegExp(`^<${tag}>|<\\/${tag}>$`, 'gi'), '').trim())
              .filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
            $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').val(extracted);
            $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-fetch-info').html(`✓ 找到 <b>${matches.length}</b> 处 <${esc(tag)}> 内容，共 <b>${extracted.length}</b> 字`);
            updateSrcCount();
            toast('success', `已提取 ${matches.length} 处 <${tag}> 内容`);
          } catch(e) { toast('error', `获取失败：${e.message}`); }
        });

        // 要求自动保存
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-reqs').on('input', function() {
          aiSummaryDraft = $j(this).val() || '';
          saveAiSummaryDraft();
        });

        // 上传按钮 → 触发隐藏的 file input
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-upload-btn').on('click', () => {
          $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-file').trigger('click');
        });

        // 清空按钮
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-clear').on('click', () => {
          $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').val('');
          $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-file').val('');
          $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-filename').text('支持 .txt / .yaml / .json / .md / .log （最大 10MB）');
          updateSrcCount();
        });

        // 文件上传 → 填入文本框
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-file').on('change', function(e) {
          const f = e.target.files && e.target.files[0];
          if (!f) return;
          if (f.size > 10 * 1024 * 1024) { toast('warning','文件过大（>10MB），请分段粘贴'); return; }
          const reader = new FileReader();
          reader.onload = () => {
            let text = String(reader.result || '');
            // JSON 格式化一下便于阅读
            if (/\.json$/i.test(f.name)) {
              try { const obj = JSON.parse(text); text = JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2); } catch(e){}
            }
            $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').val(text);
            $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-filename').text(`📄 ${f.name} · ${text.length} 字`);
            updateSrcCount();
            toast('success', `已载入「${f.name}」`);
          };
          reader.onerror = () => toast('error','读取文件失败');
          reader.readAsText(f, 'utf-8');
        });

        // 生成
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-go').on('click', async () => {
          const src = ($m.find('#sw-ai-sum-source').val() || '').trim();
          const reqs = ($m.find('#sw-ai-sum-reqs').val() || '').trim();
          if (!src) { toast('warning','请先上传或粘贴主线内容'); return; }
          if (!apiConfig.url || !apiConfig.model) { toast('warning','请先在【织梦配置】里配好 API'); return; }
          const useReqs = reqs || '请结构化输出，每条信息独立成行，保持高信息密度。';
          const prompt = `你现在的任务是：对当前主线内容进行结构化"大总结"。

【核心要求】
- 必须严格按照"填写要求"来控制总结粒度和内容
- 只输出总结结果，不要解释，不要寒暄，不要任何额外说明
- 每一条必须是独立信息点，信息密度高，避免空话
- 所有总结必须来源于对话，不允许编造
- 禁止出现任何 markdown 符号（不用 #、*、_、\`、>、|、-、数字列表等任何 markdown 语法；只用纯文本 + 中文标点）

────────────────

【填写要求】
${useReqs}

────────────────

【主线内容】
${src}

────────────────

现在开始生成大总结。`;

          const $btn = $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-go');
          const $save = $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-save');
          const $wrap = $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-preview-wrap');
          const $prev = $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-preview');
          $btn.prop('disabled', true).text('生成中...');
          $wrap.show();
          $prev.text('（正在生成，请稍候...）');
          try {
            const result = await callAI(prompt);
            generatedText = (result || '').trim();
            $prev.text(generatedText || '（AI 返回为空）');
            $btn.text('重新生成');
            if (generatedText) $save.show();
            toast('success','生成完成，可预览并保存');
          } catch(e) {
            err('AI summary failed:', e);
            $prev.text('生成失败：' + (e.message || e));
            toast('error','生成失败：' + (e.message || e));
          } finally {
            $btn.prop('disabled', false);
          }
        });

        // 保存为大总结
        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-save').on('click', () => {
          if (!generatedText) { toast('warning','还没有生成内容'); return; }
          closeModal();
          // 打开编辑弹窗让用户填标题
          openSummaryEditModal(null, { title: `AI总结 · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-CN')}`, content: generatedText });
        });

        $m.find('#sw-ai-sum-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  // 导入大总结下拉框（用在番外设定"读取主线世界观"里）
  function refreshSummarySelect() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $sel = $p.find('#sw-import-summary-sel'); if (!$sel.length) return;
    const cur = $sel.val();
    $sel.empty().append('<option value="">（不导入）</option>');
    summaries.forEach(s => $sel.append($j('<option>').val(s.id).text(s.title || '(未命名)')));
    if (cur && summaries.some(s => s.id === cur)) $sel.val(cur);
  }

  function refreshCharacterSelects() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    // {{user}} 下拉
    const $u = $p.find('#sw-user-select');
    const curU = $u.val();
    $u.empty().append('<option value="">（不指定角色）</option>');
    characters.forEach(c => $u.append($j('<option>').val(c.name).text(c.name)));
    if (curU && characters.some(c => c.name === curU)) $u.val(curU);
    // 每个 NPC 行
    $p.find('.sw-npc-row').each(function() {
      const $sel = $j(this).find('.sw-npc-charselect');
      const cur = $sel.val();
      $sel.empty().append('<option value="">（选择角色）</option>');
      characters.forEach(c => $sel.append($j('<option>').val(c.name).text(c.name)));
      if (cur && characters.some(c => c.name === cur)) $sel.val(cur);
    });
  }

  function openAddCharModal() { _openCharModal(-1); }

  function _openCharModal(editIdx) {
    const existing = (editIdx >= 0 && characters[editIdx]) ? characters[editIdx] : null;
    showModal({
      title: existing ? '编辑角色' : '添加角色',
      body: `
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>角色代称</label>
          <input type="text" id="sw-char-modal-name" placeholder="例：林砚" value="${existing ? esc(existing.name) : ''}">
        </div>
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>角色人设 / 描述</label>
          <textarea id="sw-char-modal-desc" rows="6" placeholder="粘贴或填写角色设定（性格、背景、外貌、口癖等）">${existing ? esc(existing.description || '') : ''}</textarea>
        </div>
        <div class="dg-hint">此人设可被{{user}}或互动角色字段挂载，在生成时作为角色档案提供给AI</div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-char-modal-save" style="flex:1;">保存</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-char-modal-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">取消</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        $p.find('#sw-char-modal-save').on('click', () => {
          const name = ($p.find('#sw-char-modal-name').val() || '').trim();
          const desc = ($p.find('#sw-char-modal-desc').val() || '').trim();
          if (!name) { toast('warning','请输入角色代称'); return; }
          if (editIdx >= 0 && characters[editIdx]) {
            characters[editIdx] = { name, description: desc };
          } else {
            if (characters.some(c => c.name === name)) { toast('warning','角色代称已存在'); return; }
            characters.push({ name, description: desc });
          }
          saveCharacters(); renderCharacterLibrary(); refreshCharacterSelects();
          closeModal();
          toast('success', existing ? '角色已更新' : '角色已添加');
        });
        $p.find('#sw-char-modal-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // NPC 行管理
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function addNpcRow() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    $p.find('#sw-npc-empty-hint').hide();
    const $row = $j(`<div class="sw-npc-row">
      <select class="sw-npc-charselect"><option value="">（选择角色）</option></select>
      <input type="text" class="sw-npc-caserole" placeholder="番外身份（留空则沿用主线）">
      <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm sw-npc-random" title="填入「随机」" style="flex-shrink:0;padding:2px 8px;height:28px;font-size:11px;">随机</button>
      <select class="sw-npc-memory" title="记忆状态">
        <option value="随机">随机</option>
        <option value="完整保留">完整保留</option>
        <option value="部分失忆">部分失忆</option>
        <option value="完全失忆">完全失忆</option>
      </select>
      <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-danger dg-btn-sm sw-npc-del" title="删除">✕</button>
    </div>`);
    const $sel = $row.find('.sw-npc-charselect');
    characters.forEach(c => $sel.append($j('<option>').val(c.name).text(c.name)));
    $row.find('.sw-npc-random').on('click', () => $row.find('.sw-npc-caserole').val('随机'));
    $row.find('.sw-npc-del').on('click', () => {
      $row.remove();
      if (!$p.find('.sw-npc-row').length) $p.find('#sw-npc-empty-hint').show();
    });
    $p.find('#sw-npc-list').append($row);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 大纲管理（联动模式）
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function addOutlineCard(label, content) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    $p.find('#sw-outlines-empty').hide();
    const $card = $j(`<div class="sw-outline-card">
      <div class="sw-outline-card-header">
        <span class="sw-outline-card-label">${esc(label || '未命名番外')}</span>
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm dg-btn-danger sw-outline-del">✕</button>
      </div>
      <textarea class="sw-outline-content" placeholder="粘贴前序番外的大纲 / 关键信息 / 结局..."></textarea>
    </div>`);
    $card.data('label', label || '未命名番外');
    $card.find('.sw-outline-content').val(content || '');
    $card.find('.sw-outline-del').on('click', () => {
      $card.remove();
      if (!$p.find('.sw-outline-card').length) $p.find('#sw-outlines-empty').show();
    });
    $p.find('#sw-link-outlines').append($card);
  }

  async function addOutlineFromWorldbook() {
    if (!apisReady) { toast('error','世界书API不可用'); return; }
    const entries = await getWorldbookSpinoffEntries();
    if (!entries.length) { toast('warning', `${WORLDBOOK_NAME} 中暂无番外条目`); return; }
    showModal({
      title: '从世界书选择前序番外',
      body: `
        <div class="dg-hint" style="margin-bottom:10px;">勾选要载入为大纲的番外条目：</div>
        <div id="sw-wb-pick-list" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;max-height:360px;overflow-y:auto;">
          ${entries.map((e,i) => `
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;padding:8px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;">
              <input type="checkbox" data-idx="${i}" style="margin-top:3px;flex-shrink:0;">
              <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);font-size:12px;">${esc(e.label)}</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.5;max-height:4.5em;overflow:hidden;">${esc((e.content || '').slice(0, 200))}${(e.content || '').length > 200 ? '...' : ''}</div>
              </div>
            </label>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-wb-pick-ok" style="flex:1;">添加选中项</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-wb-pick-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">取消</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        $p.find('#sw-wb-pick-ok').on('click', () => {
          const selected = [];
          $p.find('#sw-wb-pick-list input[type="checkbox"]:checked').each(function() {
            const i = parseInt($j(this).data('idx'));
            if (entries[i]) selected.push(entries[i]);
          });
          if (!selected.length) { toast('warning','请至少勾选一项'); return; }
          selected.forEach(e => addOutlineCard(e.label, e.content));
          closeModal();
          toast('success', `已添加 ${selected.length} 条大纲`);
        });
        $p.find('#sw-wb-pick-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  function addOutlineManual() {
    showModal({
      title: '手动添加前序番外大纲',
      body: `
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>番外名称</label>
          <input type="text" id="sw-manual-label" placeholder="例：变小动物番外">
        </div>
        <div class="dg-field">
          <label>大纲内容</label>
          <textarea id="sw-manual-content" rows="8" placeholder="粘贴前序番外的大纲、关键节点、结局等..."></textarea>
        </div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-manual-ok" style="flex:1;">添加</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-manual-cancel" style="padding:8px 20px;">取消</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        $p.find('#sw-manual-ok').on('click', () => {
          const label = ($p.find('#sw-manual-label').val() || '').trim();
          const content = ($p.find('#sw-manual-content').val() || '').trim();
          if (!label || !content) { toast('warning','请填写名称与内容'); return; }
          addOutlineCard(label, content);
          closeModal();
          toast('success','已添加');
        });
        $p.find('#sw-manual-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 生成流程
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function estimateTokens(s) { return Math.ceil((s || '').length / 2.5); }

  async function handleGenerate() {
    if (isGenerating) { toast('info','正在生成中...'); return; }
    let cfg; try { cfg = getConfig(); } catch(e) { toast('error','读取配置失败: ' + e.message); return; }
    if (!cfg) return;

    let prompt;
    try { prompt = await buildPrompt(cfg); } catch(e) { toast('error','构建提示词失败: ' + e.message); return; }
    showPreviewModal(cfg, prompt);
  }

  function showPreviewModal(cfg, prompt) {
    const tokens = estimateTokens(prompt);
    const poolSummary = (pd) => {
      if (!pd || pd.mode === '随机') return '随机';
      if (pd.mode === '自定义') return `自定义【${pd.custom || '(空)'}】`;
      return `${pd.mode}【${(pd.items || []).join(pd.mode==='抽取'?'/':'+') || '(未选)'}】`;
    };
    const row = (label, value) => `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:2px 0;line-height:1.5;">
        <div style="flex:0 0 64px;color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;">${label}</div>
        <div style="flex:1;color:var(--text);font-size:12px;word-break:break-word;">${value}</div>
      </div>`;
    const section = (title, inner) => `
      <section style="margin-bottom:12px;break-inside:avoid;page-break-inside:avoid;-webkit-column-break-inside:avoid;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:700;padding:0 0 4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:4px;">${title}</div>
        ${inner}
      </section>`;

    const worldRows =
      row('组合模式', esc(cfg.worldMode || '当前世界观·当前时间线')) +
      (cfg.worldMode === '当前世界观·非当前时间线' && cfg.timelinePos ? row('时间线', esc(cfg.timelinePos)) : '') +
      ((cfg.worldMode === '非当前世界观·参考当前设定' || cfg.worldMode === '非当前世界观·完全新世界') ? row('时代背景', esc(poolSummary(cfg.era))) : '');

    const styleRows =
      row('使用灵感', esc(cfg.useInspiration || '否') + (cfg.useInspiration === '是' ? ` · ${esc(poolSummary(cfg.inspiration))}` : '')) +
      row('风格',    esc(poolSummary(cfg.style))) +
      row('尺度',    esc(cfg.scale || '随机')) +
      row('侧重',    esc(cfg.plotFocus || '随机')) +
      row('走向',    esc(cfg.plotDirection || '随机')) +
      row('脑洞',    esc(cfg.creativity || '中')) +
      row('NSFW',    esc(cfg.nsfw || '关'));

    const sysRows =
      row('系统', esc(cfg.useSystem || '否') + (cfg.useSystem === '是' && cfg.systemStyle ? ` · 风格：${esc(cfg.systemStyle)}` : '')) +
      row('任务', esc(cfg.hasTask || '否')) +
      row('语言', esc(cfg.lang || '不加密'));

    const charRows =
      row('用户', esc(cfg.userCharName || '(未指定)') + (cfg.userCaseRole ? ` · ${esc(cfg.userCaseRole)}` : '')) +
      row('记忆', esc(cfg.userMemory || '完整保留')) +
      row('互动', cfg.npcs && cfg.npcs.length ? cfg.npcs.map(n => esc(n.charName) + (n.caseRole?`(${esc(n.caseRole)})`:'')).join(' ｜ ') : '(未指定)');

    const srcRows =
      row('联动模式', esc(cfg.linkMode || '关闭') + (cfg.linkMode === '开启' && cfg.linkContexts && cfg.linkContexts.length ? ` · 已载入 ${cfg.linkContexts.length} 条大纲` : '')) +
      row('读取主线', (cfg.injectChat ? '是' : '否') + (cfg.readContext === '是' ? ` · 世界书 ${(cfg.lorebookEntries || []).filter(e => e.active).length} 条` : '')) +
      (cfg.importSummaryId ? (() => { const s = summaries.find(x => x && x.id === cfg.importSummaryId); return s ? row('导入总结', esc(s.title || '(未命名)') + ` · ${(s.content||'').length} 字`) : ''; })() : '') +
      (cfg.special ? row('额外要求', esc(cfg.special)) : '');

    // 桌面端两列：左列 = 世界观 + 角色 + 系统与语言；右列 = 风格与尺度 + 内容来源
    const body = `
      <div class="sw-preview-grid">
        <div class="sw-preview-col">
          ${section('世界观 · WORLD',          worldRows)}
          ${section('角色 · CHARACTERS',       charRows)}
          ${section('系统与语言 · SYSTEM',     sysRows)}
        </div>
        <div class="sw-preview-col">
          ${section('风格与尺度 · STYLE',      styleRows)}
          ${section('内容来源 · SOURCE',       srcRows)}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:6px;padding:7px 11px;background:var(--bg3);border-left:2px solid var(--accent2);font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;">
        提示词长度：约 <b style="color:var(--accent2);">${tokens.toLocaleString()}</b> tokens
         · API：${esc(apiConfig.url ? '自定义' : '未配置')}
      </div>
      <details style="margin-top:8px;">
        <summary style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;letter-spacing:1px;">▸ 预览完整提示词</summary>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:6px;">
          <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-copy-prompt-btn" type="button">复制完整提示词</button>
        </div>
        <div class="dg-info-card" style="max-height:260px;overflow-y:auto;margin-top:5px;padding:10px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;">${esc(prompt)}</div>
      </details>
      <style>
        #sw-modal-overlay .sw-preview-grid{
          display:grid;
          grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
          gap:0 28px;
        }
        #sw-modal-overlay .sw-preview-col{min-width:0;}
        @media (max-width:640px){
          #sw-modal-overlay .sw-preview-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:0!important;}
        }
      </style>
    `;
    showModal({
      title: '织梦预览 · CONFIRM WEAVE',
      body,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-preview-go" style="flex:1.2;">确认织梦</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-preview-cancel" style="padding:8px 16px;">返回修改</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        $p.find('#sw-copy-prompt-btn').on('click', async () => {
          const ok = await copyText(prompt);
          toast(ok ? 'success' : 'error', ok ? '已复制完整提示词' : '复制失败，请手动复制');
        });
        $p.find('#sw-preview-go').on('click', () => {
          if (!apiConfig.url || !apiConfig.model) {
            toast('warning','请先在【织梦配置】中设置 API');
            return;
          }
          closeModal();
          runGeneration(cfg, prompt);
        });
        $p.find('#sw-preview-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  async function runGeneration(cfg, prompt) {
    if (!apiConfig.url || !apiConfig.model) {
      toast('warning','请先在【织梦配置】中设置 API');
      return;
    }
    isGenerating = true;
    showModal({
      title: '正在织梦 · SPINOFF WEAVING',
      body: `
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:16px 0;">
          <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:4px;">SPINOFF WEAVING...</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:3px;">构建番外剧情框架中</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dg-loading" style="justify-content:center;padding:12px 0;">
          <div class="dg-spinner"></div>
          <span id="sw-gen-stage">正在调用AI...</span>
        </div>
      `,
      closable: false,
      footer: `<button class="dg-btn" id="sw-gen-cancel" style="flex:1;">取消</button>`,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        getPopup().find('#sw-gen-cancel').on('click', () => { isGenerating = false; closeModal(); });
      },
    });
    try {
      const resp = await callAI(prompt);
      if (!isGenerating) return; // cancelled
      const parsed = parseResponse(resp);
      lastGenerated = { info: parsed.info, full: parsed.full, raw: parsed.raw, name: '', scale: cfg.scale || '随机', cfg, prompt };
      const info = parseSpinoffInfo(parsed.info || '');
      lastGenerated.name = info.name || '未命名番外';
      closeModal();
      showResultModal(parsed, info);
    } catch(e) {
      err('generate failed:', e);
      closeModal();
      toast('error', '生成失败: ' + e.message);
    } finally {
      isGenerating = false;
    }
  }

  function showResultModal(parsed, info) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const infoHtml = parsed.info
      ? `<div class="dg-info-card">${esc(parsed.info)}</div>`
      : `<div class="dg-info-card" style="color:var(--text3);">未解析到 <spinoff_info>，请查看完整内容</div>`;
    showModal({
      title: '番外已织就 · SPINOFF COMPLETE',
      body: `
        <div style="text-align:center;padding:14px 0 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:18px;">
          <div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:4px;">番外已织就</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:3px;">SPINOFF READY · DREAM WOVEN</div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;">番外摘要</div>
        ${infoHtml}
        <div style="margin-top:12px;">
          <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-toggle-details" style="font-size:11px;">▸ 展开完整番外框架</button>
        </div>
        <div id="sw-full-details" style="display:none;margin-top:9px;">
          <div class="dg-info-card" style="max-height:260px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:11px;">${esc(parsed.full || parsed.raw || '（无内容）')}</div>
        </div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" style="flex:1.2;" id="sw-inject-wb-btn">注入世界书 · INJECT</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-regenerate-btn" style="flex:1;">重新生成 · REGEN</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-close-result" style="padding:8px 16px;">离开</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        $p.find('#sw-toggle-details').on('click', function() {
          const $d = $p.find('#sw-full-details');
          $d.toggle(); $j(this).text($d.is(':visible') ? '▾ 收起完整番外框架' : '▸ 展开完整番外框架');
        });
        $p.find('#sw-inject-wb-btn').on('click', async () => {
          if (!apisReady) { toast('error','世界书API不可用'); return; }
          $p.find('#sw-inject-wb-btn').prop('disabled', true).text('注入中...');
          const content = parsed.full || parsed.raw || '';
          const ok = await injectToWorldbook(lastGenerated.name, lastGenerated.scale, content);
          $p.find('#sw-inject-wb-btn').text(ok ? '✓ 已存档' : '重试注入').prop('disabled', ok);
        });
        $p.find('#sw-regenerate-btn').on('click', () => {
          if (isGenerating) { toast('info','正在生成中...'); return; }
          const cfg = lastGenerated.cfg;
          const prompt = lastGenerated.prompt;
          if (!cfg || !prompt) { toast('warning','缺少上次生成参数，请返回主界面重新确认'); return; }
          closeModal();
          runGeneration(cfg, prompt);
        });
        $p.find('#sw-close-result').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 通用模态
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 已有番外修正流程
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function parseRevisionResponse(text) {
    const raw = String(text || '');
    const sumM = raw.match(/<修改摘要>([\s\S]*?)<\/修改摘要>/);
    const summary = sumM ? sumM[1].trim() : '';
    const full = raw.replace(/<修改摘要>[\s\S]*?<\/修改摘要>/, '').trim();
    return { summary, full, raw };
  }

  function revisionSectionOptions(selected) {
    const sel = selected || '';
    return REVISION_SECTIONS.map(s => `<option value="${esc(s)}" ${s === sel ? 'selected' : ''}>${esc(s)}</option>`).join('');
  }

  function revisionModeButtons(active) {
    const modes = ['轻度润色','局部改写','结构重整','设定补强','完全重修'];
    return modes.map(m => `<button class="dg-opt-btn ${m === active ? 'active' : ''}" data-val="${m}">${m}</button>`).join('');
  }

  function revisionScopeRow(section = REVISION_SECTIONS[0], note = '') {
    return `<div class="sw-rev-scope-row" style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:6px;">
      <select class="sw-rev-scope-section" style="flex:0 0 190px;height:32px;font-size:12px;padding:5px 7px;">${revisionSectionOptions(section)}</select>
      <textarea class="sw-rev-scope-note" rows="2" placeholder="写明这一项要怎么改..." style="flex:1;min-height:32px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;padding:6px 8px;">${esc(note)}</textarea>
      <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm dg-btn-danger sw-rev-scope-del" type="button" style="height:32px;flex-shrink:0;">✕</button>
    </div>`;
  }

  async function openRevisionModal(seed = null) {
    if (!apisReady) { toast('error','世界书API不可用'); return; }
    const entries = await getWorldbookSpinoffEntries();
    if (!entries.length) { toast('warning', `${WORLDBOOK_NAME} 中暂无番外条目`); return; }
    const cfg = seed || { apiIdx:'', entryIdx:'', mode:'轻度润色', generalNote:'', scopes:[], preserve:[], prompt: currentRevisionPrompt };
    const apiOptions = savedPresets.map((pr,i) => `<option value="${i}" ${String(cfg.apiIdx)===String(i)?'selected':''}>${esc(pr.name || ('API预设 '+(i+1)))}</option>`).join('');
    const entryOptions = entries.map((e,i) => `<option value="${i}" ${String(cfg.entryIdx)===String(i)?'selected':''}>${esc(e.label)}</option>`).join('');
    const preserveChecks = REVISION_SECTIONS.map(s => `<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:11px;padding:4px 0;cursor:pointer;"><input type="checkbox" class="sw-rev-preserve" value="${esc(s)}" ${(cfg.preserve||[]).includes(s)?'checked':''}>${esc(s)}</label>`).join('');
    showModal({
      title: '已有番外修正 · REVISION',
      body: `
        <div class="dg-field"><label>选择 API 预设</label><select id="sw-rev-api"><option value="">— 选择预设 —</option>${apiOptions}</select><div class="dg-hint">从“织梦配置”保存过的 API 预设中选择，本次修正将使用该配置。</div></div>
        <div class="dg-field"><label>已有番外修正</label><select id="sw-rev-entry"><option value="">— 选择世界书条目 —</option>${entryOptions}</select></div>
        <details id="sw-rev-original-wrap" style="margin:-4px 0 12px;"><summary style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;">▸ 预览原文</summary><div id="sw-rev-original" class="dg-info-card" style="max-height:180px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:11px;margin-top:5px;white-space:pre-wrap;"></div></details>
        <div class="dg-field"><label>修改模式</label><div class="dg-option-group" id="sw-rev-mode-group">${revisionModeButtons(cfg.mode)}</div></div>
        <div class="dg-field" id="sw-rev-general-box"><label>修改要求</label><textarea id="sw-rev-general-note" rows="3" placeholder="写明本次修正的整体要求...">${esc(cfg.generalNote || '')}</textarea></div>
        <div class="dg-field" id="sw-rev-scope-box" style="display:none;"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;"><label style="margin-bottom:0;">局部改写范围</label><button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-rev-add-scope" type="button">＋ 添加一项</button></div><div id="sw-rev-scope-list">${(cfg.scopes||[]).map(x => revisionScopeRow(x.section, x.note)).join('')}</div><div class="dg-hint">可多次添加，每条选择一个章节并填写要修改的内容。</div></div>
        <div class="dg-field"><label>保留指定内容</label><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:0 10px;max-height:170px;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:7px 10px;">${preserveChecks}</div><div class="dg-hint">完全重修时作为硬性保留锚点；其他模式也会作为额外保留约束。</div></div>
        <div class="dg-field"><button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-rev-toggle-prompt" type="button">提示词编辑</button><div id="sw-rev-prompt-box" style="display:none;margin-top:8px;"><textarea id="sw-rev-prompt" rows="12" style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.55;">${esc(cfg.prompt || currentRevisionPrompt)}</textarea><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;"><button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-rev-save-prompt" type="button">保存为默认</button><button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-rev-reset-prompt" type="button">重置</button></div></div></div>
      `,
      footer: `<button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-rev-confirm" style="flex:1.2;">确定</button><button class="dg-btn" id="sw-rev-cancel" style="padding:8px 16px;">返回</button>`,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        const refreshOriginal = () => {
          const idx = parseInt($p.find('#sw-rev-entry').val());
          const e = entries[idx];
          $p.find('#sw-rev-original').text(e ? (e.content || '（无内容）') : '');
        };
        const refreshMode = () => {
          const mode = $p.find('#sw-rev-mode-group .active').data('val') || '轻度润色';
          $p.find('#sw-rev-scope-box').toggle(mode === '局部改写');
          $p.find('#sw-rev-general-box').toggle(mode !== '局部改写');
          if (mode === '局部改写' && !$p.find('.sw-rev-scope-row').length) $p.find('#sw-rev-scope-list').append(revisionScopeRow());
        };
        $p.find('#sw-rev-entry').on('change', refreshOriginal); refreshOriginal();
        $p.find('#sw-rev-mode-group').on('click', '.dg-opt-btn', function(){ $p.find('#sw-rev-mode-group .dg-opt-btn').removeClass('active'); $j(this).addClass('active'); refreshMode(); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-add-scope').on('click', () => $p.find('#sw-rev-scope-list').append(revisionScopeRow()));
        $p.find('#sw-rev-scope-list').on('click', '.sw-rev-scope-del', function(){ $j(this).closest('.sw-rev-scope-row').remove(); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-toggle-prompt').on('click', () => $p.find('#sw-rev-prompt-box').toggle());
        $p.find('#sw-rev-save-prompt').on('click', () => { currentRevisionPrompt = $p.find('#sw-rev-prompt').val() || DEFAULT_REVISION_PROMPT; try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY_REVISION_PROMPT, currentRevisionPrompt); } catch(e) {} toast('success','修正提示词已保存'); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-reset-prompt').on('click', () => $p.find('#sw-rev-prompt').val(DEFAULT_REVISION_PROMPT));
        refreshMode();
        $p.find('#sw-rev-confirm').on('click', () => {
          const apiIdx = $p.find('#sw-rev-api').val();
          const entryIdx = $p.find('#sw-rev-entry').val();
          if (apiIdx === '' || !savedPresets[parseInt(apiIdx)]?.apiConfig) { toast('warning','请先选择 API 预设'); return; }
          if (entryIdx === '' || !entries[parseInt(entryIdx)]) { toast('warning','请先选择已有番外'); return; }
          const scopes = [];
          $p.find('.sw-rev-scope-row').each(function(){ const section = $j(this).find('.sw-rev-scope-section').val(); const note = ($j(this).find('.sw-rev-scope-note').val() || '').trim(); if (section || note) scopes.push({ section, note }); });
          const mode = $p.find('#sw-rev-mode-group .active').data('val') || '轻度润色';
          if (mode === '局部改写' && !scopes.some(x => x.note)) { toast('warning','请至少填写一条局部改写说明'); return; }
          const preserve = [];
          $p.find('.sw-rev-preserve:checked').each(function(){ preserve.push($j(this).val()); });
          const revCfg = { apiIdx, entryIdx, apiPresetName: savedPresets[parseInt(apiIdx)].name || '', apiConfig: { ...savedPresets[parseInt(apiIdx)].apiConfig }, entry: entries[parseInt(entryIdx)], mode, generalNote: ($p.find('#sw-rev-general-note').val() || '').trim(), scopes, preserve, prompt: $p.find('#sw-rev-prompt').val() || DEFAULT_REVISION_PROMPT };
          try { currentRevisionPrompt = revCfg.prompt; localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY_REVISION_PROMPT, currentRevisionPrompt); } catch(e) {}
          const prompt = buildRevisionPrompt(revCfg);
          closeModal();
          showRevisionPreviewModal(revCfg, prompt);
        });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  function buildRevisionPrompt(cfg) {
    const scopeText = cfg.mode === '局部改写'
      ? (cfg.scopes || []).map((x,i) => `${i+1}. ${x.section || '(未选章节)'}：${x.note || '(未填写说明)'}`).join('\n')
      : '非局部改写模式：按所选修改模式处理全文。';
    const preserveText = (cfg.preserve && cfg.preserve.length) ? cfg.preserve.join('、') : '无额外指定。';
    const generalText = cfg.generalNote ? cfg.generalNote : '无额外整体要求。';
    const block = `[原文标题] ${cfg.entry?.label || '未命名番外'}\n[原文]\n${cfg.entry?.content || ''}\n\n[修改模式] ${cfg.mode}\n[整体修改要求]\n${generalText}\n\n[操作范围]\n${scopeText}\n\n[保留指定内容]\n${preserveText}`;
    return (cfg.prompt || DEFAULT_REVISION_PROMPT).replace('{{MODULE_0_REVISION_BLOCK}}', block);
  }

  function showRevisionPreviewModal(cfg, prompt) {
    const tokens = estimateTokens(prompt);
    const scopeHtml = cfg.mode === '局部改写' ? (cfg.scopes || []).map(x => `<div>${esc(x.section)}：${esc(x.note || '(空)')}</div>`).join('') : '<div>按模式处理全文</div>';
    showModal({
      title: '修正预览 · CONFIRM REVISION',
      body: `<div class="dg-info-card" style="line-height:1.7;font-size:12px;"><div><b>API：</b>${esc(cfg.apiPresetName || cfg.apiConfig?.model || '未命名预设')}</div><div><b>番外：</b>${esc(cfg.entry?.label || '未命名番外')}</div><div><b>模式：</b>${esc(cfg.mode)}</div><div><b>整体要求：</b>${esc(cfg.generalNote || '无')}</div><div><b>操作范围：</b>${scopeHtml}</div><div><b>保留：</b>${esc((cfg.preserve||[]).join('、') || '无')}</div><div style="margin-top:7px;color:var(--text3);">提示词长度：约 ${tokens.toLocaleString()} tokens</div></div><details style="margin-top:10px;"><summary style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;padding:3px 0;">▸ 预览完整提示词</summary><div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:6px;"><button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-copy-rev-prompt" type="button">复制完整提示词</button></div><div class="dg-info-card" style="max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;margin-top:5px;padding:10px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;">${esc(prompt)}</div></details>`,
      footer: `<button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-rev-go" style="flex:1.2;">确定</button><button class="dg-btn" id="sw-rev-back" style="padding:8px 16px;">返回修改</button>`,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        $p.find('#sw-copy-rev-prompt').on('click', async () => { const ok = await copyText(prompt); toast(ok ? 'success' : 'error', ok ? '已复制完整提示词' : '复制失败，请手动复制'); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-go').on('click', () => { closeModal(); runRevision(cfg, prompt); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-back').on('click', () => { closeModal(); openRevisionModal(cfg); });
      },
    });
  }

  async function runRevision(cfg, prompt) {
    if (isGenerating) { toast('info','正在生成中...'); return; }
    apiConfig = { ...cfg.apiConfig };
    isGenerating = true;
    showModal({
      title: '正在修正 · REVISING SPINOFF',
      body: `<div style="text-align:center;padding:16px 0;"><div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:4px;">REVISING...</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:3px;">生成修改后内容中</div></div><div class="dg-loading" style="justify-content:center;padding:12px 0;"><div class="dg-spinner"></div><span>正在调用AI...</span></div>`,
      closable: false,
      footer: `<button class="dg-btn" id="sw-rev-cancel-run" style="flex:1;">取消</button>`,
      onAfterRender: () => getPopup().find('#sw-rev-cancel-run').on('click', () => { isGenerating = false; closeModal(); }),
    });
    try {
      const resp = await callAI(prompt);
      if (!isGenerating) return;
      const parsed = parseRevisionResponse(resp);
      lastRevision = { cfg, prompt, parsed };
      closeModal();
      showRevisionResultModal(cfg, prompt, parsed);
    } catch(e) {
      err('revision failed:', e);
      closeModal();
      toast('error', '修正失败: ' + e.message);
    } finally {
      isGenerating = false;
    }
  }

  function showRevisionResultModal(cfg, prompt, parsed) {
    const titleBase = (cfg.entry?.label || '未命名番外').replace(/\s*·\s*\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}[\s\S]*$/, '').replace(/（修正版）$/, '');
    showModal({
      title: '番外修正完成 · REVISION COMPLETE',
      body: `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;">修改摘要</div><div class="dg-info-card" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">${esc(parsed.summary || '未解析到 <修改摘要>，请展开完整内容查看。')}</div><div style="margin-top:12px;"><button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-rev-toggle-full" style="font-size:11px;">▸ 展开完整修改后内容</button></div><div id="sw-rev-full" style="display:none;margin-top:9px;"><div class="dg-info-card" style="max-height:320px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:11px;white-space:pre-wrap;">${esc(parsed.full || parsed.raw || '（无内容）')}</div></div>`,
      footer: `<button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-rev-save-new" style="flex:1.1;">新建保存</button><button class="dg-btn" id="sw-rev-save-overwrite" style="flex:1;">覆盖保存</button><button class="dg-btn" id="sw-rev-regen" style="flex:1;">重新生成</button><button class="dg-btn" id="sw-rev-return" style="padding:8px 16px;">返回</button>`,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        $p.find('#sw-rev-toggle-full').on('click', function(){ const $d=$p.find('#sw-rev-full'); $d.toggle(); $j(this).text($d.is(':visible') ? '▾ 收起完整修改后内容' : '▸ 展开完整修改后内容'); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-save-new').on('click', async () => { const ok = await injectToWorldbook(`${titleBase}（修正版）`, '', parsed.full || parsed.raw || ''); if (ok) $p.find('#sw-rev-save-new').prop('disabled', true).text('✓ 已新建'); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-save-overwrite').on('click', async () => { const ok = await overwriteWorldbookSpinoffEntry(cfg.entry, parsed.full || parsed.raw || ''); if (ok) $p.find('#sw-rev-save-overwrite').prop('disabled', true).text('✓ 已覆盖'); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-regen').on('click', () => { closeModal(); runRevision(cfg, prompt); });
        $p.find('#sw-rev-return').on('click', () => { closeModal(); openRevisionModal(cfg); });
      },
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 通用模态
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function showModal({ title, body, footer, closable = true, onAfterRender }) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    closeModal();
    const H$ = getHostJQ() || $j;
    const hd = getHostDocument();
    const hw = getHostWindow();
    const $sh = H$(`#${SHELL_ID}`, hd);
    const scrollTop = $sh.scrollTop() || 0;
    const viewH = (hw.visualViewport && hw.visualViewport.height) || hw.innerHeight || 600;
    const $o = $j(`
      <div class="dg-modal-overlay" id="sw-modal-overlay">
        <div class="dg-modal">
          <div class="dg-modal-header">
            <div class="dg-modal-title">${title}</div>
            ${closable ? '<button class="dg-btn dg-btn-sm" id="sw-modal-close-x">✕</button>' : ''}
          </div>
          <div class="dg-modal-body">${body}</div>
          ${footer ? `<div class="dg-modal-footer">${footer}</div>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>`);
    $o.css({ top: scrollTop + 'px', height: viewH + 'px', bottom: 'auto' });
    $sh.css('overflow-y', 'hidden');
    $p.append($o);
    if (closable) {
      $o.on('click', e => { if ($j(e.target).is($o)) closeModal(); });
      $p.find('#sw-modal-close-x').on('click', closeModal);
    }
    if (onAfterRender) onAfterRender();
  }

  function closeModal() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    $p.find('#sw-modal-overlay').remove();
    const H$ = getHostJQ() || $j;
    const hd = getHostDocument();
    H$(`#${SHELL_ID}`, hd).css('overflow-y', '');
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // API 操作
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  function updateApiStatus() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const $s = $p.find('#sw-api-status');
    if (apiConfig.url && apiConfig.model) $s.html(`URL: ${esc(apiConfig.url)}<br>模型: ${esc(apiConfig.model)}`);
    else $s.text(apiConfig.url ? '已配置URL，请加载并选择模型' : '状态: 未配置');
  }

  async function loadModels() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    const url = $p.find('#sw-api-url').val().trim();
    const key = $p.find('#sw-api-key').val();
    if (!url) { toast('warning','请输入API基础URL'); return; }
    let mu = url.endsWith('/') ? url : url + '/';
    if (!mu.includes('v1/')) mu += 'v1/';
    mu += 'models';
    $p.find('#sw-api-status').text('正在加载模型列表...');
    try {
      const h = { 'Content-Type':'application/json' };
      if (key) h['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${key}`;
      const res = await fetch(mu, { method: 'GET', headers: h });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);
      const data = await res.json();
      const $sel = $p.find('#sw-api-model');
      $sel.empty();
      let models = [];
      if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) models = data.data.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean);
      else if (Array.isArray(data)) models = data.map(m => typeof m === 'string' ? m : m.id).filter(Boolean);
      if (!models.length) { $sel.append('<option value="">未发现模型</option>'); toast('warning','未能解析模型列表'); return; }
      models.forEach(m => $sel.append($j('<option>').val(m).text(m)));
      if (apiConfig.model && models.includes(apiConfig.model)) $sel.val(apiConfig.model);
      toast('success', `加载了 ${models.length} 个模型`);
    } catch(e) { toast('error', `加载失败: ${e.message}`); }
  }

  function saveApiConfig() {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p) return;
    apiConfig = { url: $p.find('#sw-api-url').val().trim(), apiKey: $p.find('#sw-api-key').val(), model: $p.find('#sw-api-model').val() };
    saveSettings(); updateApiStatus(); toast('success','API配置已保存');
  }

  function clearApiConfig() {
    apiConfig = { url: '', apiKey: '', model: '' };
    const $p = getPopup();
    if ($p) {
      $p.find('#sw-api-url').val(''); $p.find('#sw-api-key').val('');
      $p.find('#sw-api-model').empty().append('<option value="">请先加载模型列表</option>');
    }
    saveSettings(); updateApiStatus(); toast('info','API配置已清除');
  }

  function loadGenPreset(pr) {
    const $p = getPopup(); if (!$p || !pr.cfg) return;
    const cfg = pr.cfg;

    // 互斥按钮组辅助
    const so = (gid, val) => {
      if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return;
      $p.find(`#${gid} .dg-opt-btn`).removeClass('active');
      const $m = $p.find(`#${gid} .dg-opt-btn[data-val="${val}"]`);
      if ($m.length) $m.addClass('active');
    };

    // Pool 字段还原
    const loadPool = (poolData, modeGid, poolPanelSel, customInputId, poolClass) => {
      if (!poolData) return;
      so(modeGid, poolData.mode || '随机');
      // 显隐
      $p.find(poolPanelSel).toggle(poolData.mode === '抽取' || poolData.mode === '固定');
      if (customInputId) {
        $p.find(`#${customInputId}`).toggle(poolData.mode === '自定义').val(poolData.custom || '');
      }
      // 清除活动标签然后重新激活
      $p.find(`.${poolClass} .dg-tag-btn`).removeClass('active');
      (poolData.items || []).forEach(it => {
        $p.find(`.${poolClass} .dg-tag-btn[data-pool-item="${it}"]`).addClass('active');
      });
      // 更新每个 group 的计数
      $p.find(poolPanelSel + ' .sw-pool-group').each(function() { updatePoolGroupCount($j(this)); });
    };

    // 世界观 + 时间线 + 时代背景
    so('sw-worldmode-group', cfg.worldMode);
    $p.find('#sw-timeline-field').toggle(cfg.worldMode === '当前世界观·非当前时间线');
    $p.find('#sw-era-field').toggle(cfg.worldMode === '非当前世界观·参考当前设定' || cfg.worldMode === '非当前世界观·完全新世界');
    const WM_HINTS_LOAD = {
      '当前世界观·当前时间线':    '偏向「日常番外 / 关系补全 / 隐藏剧情线」',
      '当前世界观·非当前时间线':  '偏向「if线 / 时间穿越 / 平行时间差重构」',
      '非当前世界观·参考当前设定':'偏向「AU同人 / 规则改写下的人格投影」',
      '非当前世界观·完全新世界':  '偏向「快穿 / 副本流 / 完全重置身份体验」',
    };
    $p.find('#sw-worldmode-hint').text(WM_HINTS_LOAD[cfg.worldMode || '当前世界观·当前时间线'] || '');
    if (cfg.timelinePos) {
      // 判断是否是内置选项
      const builtins = ['过去','未来','平行时间线·if线','随机','自定义'];
      if (builtins.includes(cfg.timelinePos)) {
        so('sw-timeline-group', cfg.timelinePos);
        $p.find('#sw-timeline-custom').toggle(cfg.timelinePos === '自定义');
      } else {
        so('sw-timeline-group', '自定义');
        $p.find('#sw-timeline-custom').toggle(true).val(cfg.timelinePos);
      }
    }
    loadPool(cfg.era, 'sw-era-mode-group', '#sw-era-pool-panel', 'sw-era-custom', 'sw-era-pool');

    // 灵感
    so('sw-useinspiration-group', cfg.useInspiration);
    $p.find('#sw-insp-field').toggle(cfg.useInspiration === '是');
    loadPool(cfg.inspiration, 'sw-insp-mode-group', '#sw-insp-pool-panel', 'sw-insp-custom', 'sw-insp-pool');

    // 风格
    loadPool(cfg.style, 'sw-style-mode-group', '#sw-style-pool-panel', 'sw-style-custom', 'sw-style-pool');
    updateAllPoolSelCounts();

    // 简单单选
    so('sw-scale-group',      cfg.scale);
    so('sw-plotfocus-group',  cfg.plotFocus);
    so('sw-plotdirection-group', cfg.plotDirection);
    so('sw-creativity-group', cfg.creativity);
    updateAllChoiceHints();
    so('sw-nsfw-group',       cfg.nsfw);
    so('sw-usesystem-group',  cfg.useSystem);
    so('sw-hastask-group',    cfg.hasTask);
    so('sw-lang-group',       cfg.lang);
    so('sw-user-memory-group',cfg.userMemory);

    // 系统风格
    $p.find('#sw-systemstyle-field').toggle(cfg.useSystem === '是');
    if (cfg.systemStyle) {
      const sysBuiltins = ['甜萌系','毒舌系','高冷系','中二系','迷糊系','老好人系','商人系','隐身系','随机','自定义'];
      if (sysBuiltins.includes(cfg.systemStyle)) {
        so('sw-systemstyle-group', cfg.systemStyle);
        $p.find('#sw-systemstyle-custom').toggle(cfg.systemStyle === '自定义');
      } else {
        so('sw-systemstyle-group', '自定义');
        $p.find('#sw-systemstyle-custom').toggle(true).val(cfg.systemStyle);
      }
    }

    // {{user}} 身份
    $p.find('#sw-user-select').val(cfg.userCharName || '');
    $p.find('#sw-user-role').val(cfg.userCaseRole || '');

    // NPC 行还原
    $p.find('.sw-npc-row').remove();
    $p.find('#sw-npc-empty-hint').show();
    (cfg.npcs || []).forEach(npc => {
      addNpcRow();
      const $last = $p.find('.sw-npc-row').last();
      $last.find('.sw-npc-charselect').val(npc.charName || '');
      $last.find('.sw-npc-caserole').val(npc.caseRole || '');
      $last.find('.sw-npc-memory').val(npc.memory || '随机');
    });

    // 联动
    so('sw-linkmode-group', cfg.linkMode);
    $p.find('#sw-link-sub-area').toggle(cfg.linkMode === '开启');
    $p.find('#sw-link-config').val(cfg.linkConfig || '');
    $p.find('.sw-outline-card').remove();
    $p.find('#sw-outlines-empty').show();
    (cfg.linkContexts || []).forEach(c => addOutlineCard(c.label, c.content));

    // 主线读取
    $p.find('#sw-inject-chat').prop('checked', !!cfg.injectChat);
    so('sw-context-group', cfg.readContext);
    $p.find('#sw-lorebook-area').toggle(cfg.readContext === '是');
    if (cfg.lorebookEntries && cfg.lorebookEntries.length) {
      const $list = $p.find('#sw-lorebook-list');
      $list.empty();
      cfg.lorebookEntries.forEach(entry => {
        const $tag = $j(`<button class="dg-tag-btn${entry.active ? ' active' : ''}" title="${esc((entry.content||'').slice(0,120))}">${esc(entry.label)}</button>`);
        $tag.on('click', function() { $j(this).toggleClass('active'); });
        $tag.data('entry', entry);
        $list.append($tag);
      });
    }
    // 导入大总结
    refreshSummarySelect();
    if (cfg.importSummaryId) $p.find('#sw-import-summary-sel').val(cfg.importSummaryId);

    // 额外要求
    $p.find('#sw-special').val(cfg.special || '');

    toast('success', `预设 "${pr.name}" 已载入`);
  }
