  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 导出 / 导入
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  // 同名时自动追加 (1)、(2) 等后缀
  function _uniqueName(baseName, existingNames) {
    const name = String(baseName || '未命名');
    if (!existingNames.includes(name)) return name;
    // 若名字已带 (n)，从 n+1 起继续；否则从 1 开始
    const m = name.match(/^(.*?)(?:\((\d+)\))?$/);
    const stem = (m && m[1]) ? m[1].replace(/\s+$/, '') : name;
    let n = 1;
    while (existingNames.includes(`${stem}(${n})`)) n++;
    return `${stem}(${n})`;
  }

  function handleExport() {
    // 构建可选项树（仅生成器 + 提示词预设可勾选；人设库 + 自定义选项库静默打包）
    const sections = [
      {
        key: 'genPresets',  label: '生成器预设', items: savedGenPresets,
      },
      {
        key: 'promptPresets', label: '提示词预设', items: savedPromptPresets,
      },
    ];

    const renderSection = (s) => {
      if (s.single) {
        if (!s.available) return '';
        return `<div class="sw-exp-sec" data-key="${s.key}">
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);font-size:13px;padding:6px 0;">
            <input type="checkbox" class="sw-exp-sec-single" data-key="${s.key}">
            ${esc(s.label)}
          </label>
        </div>`;
      }
      const items = s.items || [];
      const header = `<div class="sw-exp-sec-head" data-key="${s.key}" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;">
        <span class="sw-exp-sec-chev" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);transition:transform .2s;">▸</span>
        <input type="checkbox" class="sw-exp-sec-all" data-key="${s.key}" ${items.length ? '' : 'disabled'} title="全选本组" onclick="event.stopPropagation();">
        <span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);font-size:13px;">${esc(s.label)}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">(${items.length})</span>
      </div>`;
      const body = `<div class="sw-exp-sec-body" data-key="${s.key}" style="display:none;padding-left:22px;border-left:1px dashed var(--border);margin-left:4px;">
        ${items.length ? items.map((it, i) => `
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:3px 0;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">
            <input type="checkbox" class="sw-exp-item" data-key="${s.key}" data-idx="${i}">
            <span>${esc(it.name || ('#' + (i+1)))}</span>
          </label>
        `).join('') : '<div class="dg-hint" style="padding:4px 0;">（无条目）</div>'}
      </div>`;
      return `<div class="sw-exp-sec" data-key="${s.key}">${header}${body}</div>`;
    };

    showModal({
      title: '选择要导出的内容',
      body: `
        <div class="dg-hint" style="margin-bottom:8px;">点击分组展开条目，可跨组多选任意若干条；不展开时勾「全选」即全组导出。</div>
        <div id="sw-exp-tree" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;max-height:420px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px;">
          ${sections.map(renderSection).join('')}
        </div>
      `,
      footer: `
        <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-exp-ok" style="flex:1;">导出 JSON</button>
        <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-exp-cancel" style="padding:8px 16px;">取消</button>
      `,
      onAfterRender: () => {
        const $p = getPopup();
        // 展开/折叠
        $p.find('.sw-exp-sec-head').on('click', function() {
          const key = $j(this).data('key');
          const $body = $p.find(`.sw-exp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"]`);
          const open = $body.is(':visible');
          $body.toggle(!open);
          $j(this).find('.sw-exp-sec-chev').css('transform', open ? 'rotate(0)' : 'rotate(90deg)');
        });
        // 全选本组 → 同步子项
        $p.find('.sw-exp-sec-all').on('change', function() {
          const key = $j(this).data('key');
          const checked = this.checked;
          $p.find(`.sw-exp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"] .sw-exp-item`).prop('checked', checked);
        });
        // 子项变化 → 更新全选态（indeterminate）
        $p.find('.sw-exp-item').on('change', function() {
          const key = $j(this).data('key');
          const $body = $p.find(`.sw-exp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"]`);
          const total = $body.find('.sw-exp-item').length;
          const sel = $body.find('.sw-exp-item:checked').length;
          const $all = $p.find(`.sw-exp-sec-all[data-key="${key}"]`);
          $all.prop('checked', sel === total && total > 0);
          $all.prop('indeterminate', sel > 0 && sel < total);
        });
        // 导出
        $p.find('#sw-exp-ok').on('click', () => {
          const payload = { __type: 'spinoffWeaver_export_v1', exportedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
          let hasAny = false;
          const collect = (key, source) => {
            const idxs = [];
            $p.find(`.sw-exp-item[data-key="${key}"]:checked`).each(function() { idxs.push(parseInt($j(this).data('idx'))); });
            const allChecked = $p.find(`.sw-exp-sec-all[data-key="${key}"]`).is(':checked');
            if (idxs.length > 0) return idxs.map(i => source[i]).filter(Boolean);
            if (allChecked) return source.slice();
            return null;
          };
          const genPicks = collect('genPresets',    savedGenPresets);
          const ppPicks  = collect('promptPresets', savedPromptPresets);
          if (genPicks)  { payload.genPresets    = genPicks; hasAny = true; }
          if (ppPicks)   { payload.promptPresets = ppPicks;  hasAny = true; }
          if (!hasAny) { toast('warning','请先勾选要导出的预设'); return; }
          // 静默打包：人设库 + 自定义选项库（不暴露 UI 选项，导入时自动合并）
          payload.characters    = Array.isArray(characters) ? characters : [];
          payload.customOptions = customOptions || { era:[], inspiration:[], style:[] };
          const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
          const a = document.createElement('a');
          a.href = url; a.download = `spinoff-weaver-export-${Date.now()}.json`;
          document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
          setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
          closeModal();
          toast('success','已导出');
        });
        $p.find('#sw-exp-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
      },
    });
  }

  function handleImportFile(evt) {
    const file = evt.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = (e) => {
      try {
        const data = JSON.parse(e.target.result);
        if (data.__type !== 'spinoffWeaver_export_v1') {
          toast('warning','文件格式不匹配，仍尝试导入...');
        }

        // 构建条目可选树（导入侧 · 与导出对齐：仅生成器 + 提示词预设可勾选；人设库 + 自定义选项库自动并入）
        const sections = [
          { key: 'genPresets',    label: '生成器预设', items: Array.isArray(data.genPresets) ? data.genPresets : [] },
          { key: 'promptPresets', label: '提示词预设', items: Array.isArray(data.promptPresets) ? data.promptPresets : [] },
        ];

        const renderSection = (s) => {
          if (s.single) {
            if (!s.available) return '';
            return `<div class="sw-imp-sec" data-key="${s.key}">
              <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);font-size:13px;padding:6px 0;">
                <input type="checkbox" class="sw-imp-sec-single" data-key="${s.key}" checked>
                ${esc(s.label)}
              </label>
            </div>`;
          }
          const items = s.items;
          if (!items.length) return '';
          const header = `<div class="sw-imp-sec-head" data-key="${s.key}" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;">
            <span class="sw-imp-sec-chev" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);transition:transform .2s;">▸</span>
            <input type="checkbox" class="sw-imp-sec-all" data-key="${s.key}" checked title="全选本组" onclick="event.stopPropagation();">
            <span style="font-weight:700;color:var(--accent2);font-size:13px;">${esc(s.label)}</span>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);">(${items.length})</span>
          </div>`;
          const body = `<div class="sw-imp-sec-body" data-key="${s.key}" style="display:none;padding-left:22px;border-left:1px dashed var(--border);margin-left:4px;">
            ${items.map((it, i) => `
              <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:3px 0;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">
                <input type="checkbox" class="sw-imp-item" data-key="${s.key}" data-idx="${i}" checked>
                <span>${esc(it.name || ('#' + (i+1)))}</span>
              </label>
            `).join('')}
          </div>`;
          return `<div class="sw-imp-sec" data-key="${s.key}">${header}${body}</div>`;
        };

        showModal({
          title: '选择要导入的内容',
          body: `
            <div class="dg-hint" style="margin-bottom:8px;">展开分组后可单独挑选条目。<b>同名时自动追加 (1)、(2) 后缀，不覆盖已有预设。</b></div>
            <div id="sw-imp-tree" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;max-height:420px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:4px;">
              ${sections.map(renderSection).join('')}
            </div>
          `,
          footer: `
            <button class="dg-btn dg-btn-primary" id="sw-imp-ok" style="flex:1;">确认导入</button>
            <button class="dg-btn" id="sw-imp-cancel" style="padding:8px 16px;">取消</button>
          `,
          onAfterRender: () => {
            const $p = getPopup();
            $p.find('.sw-imp-sec-head').on('click', function() {
              const key = $j(this).data('key');
              const $body = $p.find(`.sw-imp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"]`);
              const open = $body.is(':visible');
              $body.toggle(!open);
              $j(this).find('.sw-imp-sec-chev').css('transform', open ? 'rotate(0)' : 'rotate(90deg)');
            });
            $p.find('.sw-imp-sec-all').on('change', function() {
              const key = $j(this).data('key');
              const checked = this.checked;
              $p.find(`.sw-imp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"] .sw-imp-item`).prop('checked', checked);
            });
            $p.find('.sw-imp-item').on('change', function() {
              const key = $j(this).data('key');
              const $body = $p.find(`.sw-imp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"]`);
              const total = $body.find('.sw-imp-item').length;
              const sel = $body.find('.sw-imp-item:checked').length;
              const $all = $p.find(`.sw-imp-sec-all[data-key="${key}"]`);
              $all.prop('checked', sel === total && total > 0);
              $all.prop('indeterminate', sel > 0 && sel < total);
            });

            const pickItems = (key, source) => {
              const items = Array.isArray(source) ? source : [];
              const $body = $p.find(`.sw-imp-sec-body[data-key="${key}"]`);
              // 展开态下已各自取消勾选的不导入
              const idxs = [];
              $body.find('.sw-imp-item:checked').each(function() { idxs.push(parseInt($j(this).data('idx'))); });
              if (idxs.length > 0) return idxs.map(i => items[i]).filter(Boolean);
              // 若面板未打开但 "全选" 勾着 → 导整组
              if ($p.find(`.sw-imp-sec-all[data-key="${key}"]`).is(':checked')) return items.slice();
              return [];
            };

            $p.find('#sw-imp-ok').on('click', () => {
              let added = 0, renamed = 0;

              if ($p.find('.sw-imp-sec-single[data-key="apiConfig"]').is(':checked') && data.apiConfig) {
                apiConfig = { ...apiConfig, ...data.apiConfig }; saveSettings(); added++;
              }

              const addWithUnique = (picked, target, storageKey) => {
                picked.forEach(pr => {
                  if (!pr) return;
                  const names = target.map(x => x.name);
                  const origName = pr.name || '未命名';
                  const finalName = _uniqueName(origName, names);
                  if (finalName !== origName) renamed++;
                  const copy = { ...pr, name: finalName };
                  target.unshift(copy);
                  added++;
                });
                try { localStorage.setItem(storageKey, JSON.stringify(target)); } catch(e) {}
              };

              addWithUnique(pickItems('genPresets',    data.genPresets),    savedGenPresets,    STORAGE_KEY_GEN_PRESETS);
              addWithUnique(pickItems('promptPresets', data.promptPresets), savedPromptPresets, STORAGE_KEY_PROMPT_PRESETS);

              // 静默合并：人设库（同名自动加后缀，不覆盖）
              if (Array.isArray(data.characters) && data.characters.length) {
                let charAdded = 0;
                data.characters.forEach(c => {
                  if (!c) return;
                  const names = characters.map(x => x.name);
                  const origName = c.name || '未命名角色';
                  const finalName = _uniqueName(origName, names);
                  if (finalName !== origName) renamed++;
                  characters.push({ ...c, name: finalName });
                  charAdded++;
                });
                if (charAdded > 0) {
                  saveCharacters();
                  added += charAdded;
                }
              }

              // 静默合并：自定义选项库（按 label 去重，不重复添加）
              if (data.customOptions && typeof data.customOptions === 'object') {
                let optAdded = 0;
                ['era', 'inspiration', 'style'].forEach(pool => {
                  const incoming = Array.isArray(data.customOptions[pool]) ? data.customOptions[pool] : [];
                  if (!incoming.length) return;
                  const existing = customOptions[pool] || [];
                  const existingLabels = new Set(existing.map(o => o && o.label).filter(Boolean));
                  incoming.forEach(opt => {
                    if (!opt || !opt.label) return;
                    if (existingLabels.has(opt.label)) return;
                    existing.push({ label: opt.label, group: opt.group || '' });
                    existingLabels.add(opt.label);
                    optAdded++;
                  });
                  customOptions[pool] = existing;
                });
                if (optAdded > 0) {
                  saveCustomOptions();
                  added += optAdded;
                }
              }

              closeModal();
              _syncPopupState();
              const msg = renamed > 0 ? `已导入（${added} 项，其中 ${renamed} 项同名已自动加后缀）` : `已导入（${added} 项）`;
              toast('success', msg);
            });
            $p.find('#sw-imp-cancel').on('click', closeModal);
          },
        });
      } catch(err) {
        toast('error','解析失败: ' + err.message);
      }
    };
    reader.readAsText(file);
    evt.target.value = ''; // reset
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 初始化
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  let initAttempts = 0;
  async function init() {
    initAttempts++;
    log(`Init attempt ${initAttempts}`);
    if (loadApis()) {
      log(`jQuery OK, apisReady=${apisReady}`);
      loadSettings();
      addMenuItem();
      _createShellDOM();
    } else if (initAttempts < 25) {
      const delay = initAttempts <= 5 ? 1000 : initAttempts <= 15 ? 2000 : 3000;
      setTimeout(init, delay);
    } else {
      err('达到最大重试次数，放弃初始化。');
    }
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 启动
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  const FLAG = `${SCRIPT_ID}_Loaded_v1_2_0`;
  if (typeof window[FLAG] === 'undefined') {
    window[FLAG] = true;
    const wjq = setInterval(() => {
      $j = typeof $ !== 'undefined' ? $ : (typeof jQuery !== 'undefined' ? jQuery : null);
      if ($j) {
        clearInterval(wjq);
        if (typeof toastr !== 'undefined') toastr_api = toastr;
        const state = document.readyState;
        const startDelay = state === 'complete' ? 1500 : 4000;
        const go = () => setTimeout(init, startDelay);
        if (state === 'complete' || state === 'interactive') go();
        else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', go);
      }
    }, 100);
  } else {
    console.warn('[SpinoffWeaver] Script already loaded, skipping.');
  }

})();
info:
名称：🦊番外织梦阁
版本：v1.2.0

本次调整：
- 织梦启动右侧新增“已有番外修正”修正入口
- 可从 API 预设与世界书番外条目中选择原文
- 支持轻度润色、局部改写、结构重整、设定补强、完全重修
- 局部改写支持多条章节修改要求，保留内容支持多选模块
- 修正流程含提示词预览、修改进度、修改摘要展示、新建保存、覆盖保存、重新生成、返回
- 生成结果弹窗保留重新生成功能

其他功能沿用 v1.1.4。
